allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit - CropClient MCP services alpha

API server, MCP server, pages, tools, and support files.
First real push to GitHub filing cabinet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit - CropClient Claude Desktop workspace

Butler app, MCP API tools audit, mockups, and design docs.
Backup to GitHub filing cabinet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" auth login --web -p https)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo create CropClient-Claude-Desktop --public --description "Butler app, MCP API tools audit, design docs")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update SERVER-INSTALL-GUIDE with real repo URLs and accurate steps

Added pre-requisites, SSL, PM2, troubleshooting, future updates.
Linked steps to token/agent processes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cmd //c "cd /d C:\\AICode\\crop-client-services && git add api-server/APIServer1.6.js api-server/api-component1.6.js api-server/web.config api-server/web1.6.config api-server/package.json Pages/CropClient-MCP-API-Tools-Audit-Q-v1.6.html tools/Test-apiserver1.4..html tools/QUICK_START.txt tools/QUICK_START1.6.txt tools/SERVER-INSTALL-GUIDE.txt tools/SERVER-INSTALL-GUIDE1.6.txt")

Bash(cmd //c "cd /d C:\\AICode\\crop-client-services && git commit -m ""v1.6 release - APIServer, audit app, test harness, configs, guides. Fixed Grid 4 ranch/planting name bug. All 3 files synced.""")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_ProcessName -match ''node|cmd|npx|mcp|chrome|python''} | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, CPU | Format-Table -AutoSize")
